findings.title: python.django.security.audit.unvalidated-password.unvalidated-password: The password on 'user' is being set without validating the password. Call django.contrib.auth.password_validation.validate_password() with validation functions before setting the password. See https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/3.0/topics/auth/passwords/ for more information.
findings.description:
Semgrep rule python.django.security.audit.unvalidated-password.unvalidated-password detected: The password on 'user' is being set without validating the password. Call django.contrib.auth.password_validation.validate_password() with validation functions before setting the password. See https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/3.0/topics/auth/passwords/ for more information.
[AI Deep Verify: Attack scenario not viable — The rule name references Django, but the code is in a Flask application. The finding is a false positive due to framework mismatch. Additionally, the code snippet shown is only a comment line ('requires login'), not actual password setting logic, so the vulnerability cannot be confirmed.]

attack_scenario.explanation: The rule name references Django, but the code is in a Flask application. The finding is a false positive due to framework mismatch. Additionally, the code snippet shown is only a comment line ('requires login'), not actual password setting logic, so the vulnerability cannot be confirmed.

findings.tool_output: Rule: python.django.security.audit.unvalidated-password.unvalidated-password | Severity: WARNING | OWASP: [A07:2021 - Identification and Authentication Failures A07:2025 - Authentication Failures]

findings.title: Not a git repository — supply chain checks limited
findings.description: Supply chain security checks (SBOM provenance, SLSA) require a git repository. Without git history, we cannot verify commit signatures or build provenance.

findings.title: SBOM generation available via syft
findings.description: Run 'syft scan <target> -o cyclonedx-json' to generate a Software Bill of Materials. SBOMs are required for supply chain transparency (US Executive Order 14028).

findings.title: OpenSSF Scorecard not installed
findings.description: Install OpenSSF Scorecard (https://github.com/ossf/scorecard) to get automated security health checks for your dependencies and build pipeline.
